title: Reorganize header layout: move dropdown and login button to top left

requirements.text: Move the BrandingBannerDropdown component (containing About and Privacy Policy links) to be positioned next to the logo in the top left area of the header

quotes: Where the about section and privacy policy is
Move the drop down menu next to the logo, more to the top left

acceptanceCriteria: The dropdown menu is positioned in the top left area of the header, adjacent to the logo
The dropdown remains fully functional with all existing links (About, Privacy Policy, etc.)

requirements.text: Reposition the login button (currently on the right side) to be directly underneath the dropdown menu in the top left area

quotes: place the login button that is now positioned on the right side of the logo

acceptanceCriteria: The login button appears directly below the dropdown menu
The login button maintains full functionality for authentication

requirements.text: Add small spacing between the dropdown menu and login button to ensure easy touch/click targets
acceptanceCriteria: There is visible spacing between the dropdown menu and login button
The spacing is optimized for mobile and desktop interaction

constraints: Do not modify the BrandingBannerDropdown component functionality or links
Preserve all existing authentication logic in the login button
Maintain responsive design for mobile and desktop viewports
nonGoals: Changing the content or styling of the dropdown menu items
Modifying the logo size or appearance
Altering the search bar position or functionality
Changing authentication flow or Internet Identity integration
